2606.30406.title: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training
2606.30406.paper_summary: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into one model remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are either inefficient or lose performance. In this work, we propose Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a post-training paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple domain RL teachers: we first run per-domain specialised RL to obtain a set of domain teachers, then distill these teachers into the student on its own rollouts. This eliminates exposure bias and provides a dense optimization signal. On Qwen3-30B-A3B, MOPD outperforms Mix-RL, Cascade RL, Off-Policy Finetune, and Param-Merge baselines, inheriting nearly all of each teacher's capability. MOPD also enables parallel, independent development of domain teachers, removing the cross-domain coupling typical of multi-domain post-training. MOPD has been deployed in the post-training of MiMo-V2-Flash, an industrial-scale frontier model, demonstrating its practical value for capability integration in frontier-scale LLMs.
2606.30406.paper_summary_zh: 現代大型語言模型（LLMs）在後訓練階段依賴強化學習來提升特定能力，但將多種能力整合到一個模型中仍然困難。現有的方法，如Off-Policy Finetune和Mix-RL，要麼效率低下，要麼性能下降。在本研究中，我們提出了多教師在政策蒸餾（MOPD），這是一種後訓練範式，用於結合多個領域強化學習教師的能力：我們首先運行每個領域專門的強化學習，以獲得一組領域教師，然後將這些教師蒸餾到學生的自我回合中。這消除了曝光偏差並提供了密集的優化信號。在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，MOPD超越了Mix-RL、Cascade RL、Off-Policy Finetune和Param-Merge基準，幾乎繼承了每位教師的所有能力。MOPD還使領域教師的平行、獨立發展成為可能，消除了多領域後訓練中典型的跨領域耦合。MOPD已在MiMo-V2-Flash的後訓練中部署，這是一個工業規模的前沿模型，展示了其在前沿規模LLMs中能力整合的實際價值。
2606.30406.author: Wenhan Ma et.al.
2606.30406.authors: Wenhan Ma, Jianyu Wei, Liang Zhao, Hailin Zhang, Bangjun Xiao, Lei Li, Qibin Yang, Bofei Gao, Yudong Wang, Rang Li, Jinhao Dong, Zhifang Sui, Fuli Luo
